name: Dimensional Image: Nymphaea
descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Nymphaea gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After playing Nymphaea's "Strike," the {Poison} dealt by "Nymphaea" in this battle +[Arg2]%. After playing Nymphaea's "Defense," it triggers [Arg3]% {Poison} to all enemies. Each effect can take place at most once per turn.
